name: codebase-impact emits one of {prune,keep,tighten,widen} action cards per rule based on violation_count + match-quality
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-file "$PWD/rule.yaml" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>impact.txt && grep -E "\"recommendation\":\"(prune|keep|tighten|widen)\"" impact.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: r
    name: r
    description: x
    detector: bash -c "grep -l x"
' > rule.yaml
